titleStmt.title: SII 9.573: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 573. (A.R. No. 681 of 1922.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE BRIDGE ON THE ROAD LEADING TO THE SUB-COLLECTOR'S BUNGALOW AT HOSPET, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1457, Manmatha, Vaiśākha, śu. 1, corresponding to A.D. 1535 April 3, Saturday (not verifiable.) It refers itself to the reign of Achyutadēva-Mahārāya, and records that Abbarāja Timmapa, agent to the Pradhāna Tirumalarāja, made a gift of the mūlavīsa (cess) with the consent of the merchants of Tirumaladēviyara-paṭṭaṇa, Varadarājammana-paṭṭaṇa, and Kṛishṇāpura for the service of the god Tiruvēṅgaḷanātha in Tirumaladēviyara-paṭṭaṇa. Bisilahaḷḷi pass is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śrīntiruvēṁgaḷanāthāya namaḥ
svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁggaḷu salu
va 1457 neya ma(ṁ)nmathasaṁvatsarada vaiśākha śu
ddha 1 dalu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrī
vīrapratapa śrīacutadēvamahārāyarige dharma
vāgabēku yeṁdu pradhāna tirumalarājagaḷa kā
ryake karterāda Abbarājatiṁmapagaḷu svasti samasta
nijanāmāṁkamālikāpraśastarāda śrīma(ṁ)n gaurēśva
ra gaṇēśvaradēvara divyaśrīpādapadmārādhakarāda A
yyāvaḷi mukhyavāda tiramaladēviyarapaṭaṇada
seṭi paṭaṇasvāmigaḷigū varadarājaṁmanapaṭaṇa
da seṭi paṭaṇasvāmigaḷigū kruṣṇāpurada seṭi pa
ṭaṇasvāmigaḷigū dēśāvarada sālumūle mahā
nāḍigū biṁnahaṁ māḍi tirumaladēvērapaṭa
ṇada tiruvēṁgaḷanāthadēvara Amrutapaḍi dīpārā
dhanege biḍisikoṁḍu biṭṭa mūlavīsa biśilaha
ḷikaṇuve cikkaṇuveye The slab is broken after this.
Digital edition of SII 9.573 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
